_note: Replace {region} with AWS region (e.g. us-east-1), {user_pool_id} with the Cognito User Pool ID (e.g. us-east-1_aBcDeFgHi), and {domain} with either your custom domain or the Cognito prefix domain (e.g. myapp). The OIDC discovery endpoints (.well-known/*) are always on the cognito-idp domain, NOT on your custom domain. The OAuth2 endpoints (authorize, token, userInfo, revoke, logout) use the Hosted UI domain. The /oauth2/authorize endpoint only supports HTTPS GET. The /oauth2/token endpoint only supports HTTPS POST. The /oauth2/revoke endpoint revokes both the refresh token and all access tokens issued from it.
